observed_friction: Several open PBIPs had the same title; the observer sorted PIDs and selected the oldest pre-launch window.
Power BI can foreground a child UI process, while verification required PID equality with PBIDesktop.
A focused query still returned large unrelated schema and visual catalogs.
dax lint and report export-wireframe failed without the exact canonical path.
The workflow did not make the safe visual-delete path or drill-vs-series distinction prominent enough.
The monitor refreshed CPU, memory, disk, executable, and task data for every process every 20 ms although it only needed PID, parent, and start time.
Interactive tests used unbounded leave-open or raw launches, allowing duplicate same-title Desktop processes to accumulate.
Late or title/executable-based process discovery could not prove exact ownership across PID reuse and concurrent lifecycle operations.

entrypoint: report visuals add|set-bindings and report spec validate|build
observed_friction: A year-span slider was not a first-class slicer mode, and early support did not preserve numeric/date typing across every mutation path.
Dashboard repair produced same-title version directories and manual Desktop launches instead of one canonical artifact and bounded session.
